name: closed loop step promote-to-rule creates an active rule with published-standard provenance
command: mkdir -p standards/snapshots active-rules && printf 'sections:\n  5.2.5: x\n' > standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/closed-loop-test.sh" --step promote-to-rule --snapshot standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.yaml --rules-out active-rules 2>err.txt && grep -q 'class: published-standard' active-rules/owasp-asvs-5-2-5.yaml && echo ok 1>&2
